data.hit_die: None (but can take a fighting style feat that grants advantage on one attack roll per turn)
saving_throws: Dex only if Dexterity saving throw proficiency is gained through Fighter feature or class feature.
Wisdom only if Wisdom saving throw proficiency is gained through Fighter feature or class feature.
Intelligence only if Intelligence saving throw proficiency is gained through Fighter feature or class feature.
Charisma only if Charisma saving throw proficiency is gained through Fighter feature or class feature.
